blended.narrative: Hogadon is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,213 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 18".
